news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on June 12, 2025, Rakovina Therapeutics Inc. shared that its executive team will participate in the 2025 BIO International Convention occurring from June 16th to 19th in Boston, Massachusetts. Rakovina Therapeutics Inc. (TSX-V: RKV) (FSE: 7JO) is a biopharmaceutical company focusing on innovative cancer treatments using AI-powered drug discovery techniques.
news.headline: Rakovina Therapeutics Inc. to attend 2025 BIO International Convention in Boston to advance strategic partnering opportunities.

news.summary: Netcapital Inc., a digital private capital markets ecosystem based in Boston, Massachusetts, revealed the establishment of its Game Advisory Board on June 12, 2025. This initiative aims to boost strategic growth efforts and enhance interaction with the online gaming community. The company, listed on Nasdaq under NCPL and NCPLW, is taking this step to capitalize on emerging opportunities and foster closer ties within the gaming sector.
news.headline: Netcapital Inc. forms Game Advisory Board; aims to boost engagement with online game community.

news.summary: In Valencia, Spain, on June 12, 2025, Turbo Energy S.A. (Nasdaq: TURB), a renowned global company specializing in advanced AI-optimized solar energy storage technologies, revealed the acquisition of a fresh patent. This patent pertains to their groundbreaking system that merges energy storage and boosts photovoltaic production in upstream setups. The innovative system introduces a distinctive approach to improve energy efficiency and flexibility in self-consumption solar power systems, especially those tailored to avoid excess energy injection into the grid.
news.headline: Turbo Energy receives patent for innovative system enabling seamless storage integration and expansion of photovoltaic installations in Valencia.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, Saratoga Investment Corp. (NYSE:SAR) revealed a base quarterly dividend of $0.75 per share for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026. The Board of Directors declared three monthly dividends for the quarter ending on August 31, 2025.
news.headline: Saratoga Investment Corp. (NYSE:SAR) declares $0.75/share dividends for Q2 2026, paid monthly at $0.25/share.

news.summary: In a recent development, a new study revealed that 75% of the population in the city faces financial instability due to the economic downturn caused by the pandemic. The research indicated that 40% of households have experienced job loss, with 60% reporting a decrease in income. Furthermore, it was found that 30% of individuals are unable to afford essential items like food and medication. The study also highlighted that the unemployment rate has surged to 12%, marking a significant increase from the pre-pandemic level of 5%. These findings underscore the dire economic situation prevalent in the city, emphasizing the urgent need for targeted interventions to support the struggling population.
news.headline: Singfar Group adopts iO3’s V.Sight AI Video Analytics for Vessel Surveillance, enhancing digitalization efforts.

news.summary: Various models play a crucial role in providing species-specific data, predicting drug clearance/transport within living organisms, and aiding in the preclinical assessment of cancer treatments. These models offer valuable insights and contribute significantly to the understanding and development of effective therapies.
news.headline: Predictive Oncology creates 3D organoid models for Labcorp to analyze cancer therapies, predict drug outcomes in vivo.

news.summary: Expanding rapidly across Asia and the Middle East, a company is accelerating its deployment of AI robotics and expanding its platform. This move aims to strengthen its presence in the regions. The company is set to reach more markets and increase its reach to a wider audience. This strategic expansion involves a substantial investment and is expected to boost the company's growth significantly. With this initiative, the company is poised to enhance its market share and establish a stronger foothold in the AI robotics sector across Asia and the Middle East.
news.headline: Sagtec predicts 92% revenue growth by FY2025 driven by AI robotics deployment and platform expansion in Asia and the Middle East.

news.summary: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) saw a decline in its shares following this week's Worldwide Developers Conference, where the tech giant unveiled updates to its operating systems, including the introduction of "Liquid Glass" design language. Despite the event's anticipation, investors and analysts were left unimpressed with the advancements in artificial intelligence. Amidst the buzz, investors are considering the company's dividends, currently offering an annual yield of 0.52%, equivalent to a quarterly dividend of 26 cents per share ($1.04 annually). To aim for a monthly income of $500 from Apple, investors would target $6,000 annually. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Investors skeptical of Apple's upgrades at WWDC but dividends promising. Potential to earn $500/month with $6,000/yr.

news.summary: Ethereum exchange-traded funds saw a notable uptick on June 11, with $240 million in net inflows, surpassing Bitcoin ETFs' $165 million. This marked Ethereum's 18th consecutive day of inflows, showcasing a shift in investor favor towards Ethereum over Bitcoin. Experts such as Alex Kuptsikevich, FxPro's chief market analyst, highlighted Bitcoin's struggles to surpass the $110,000 resistance level, leading to a sell-off that saw Bitcoin fall below $108,000. This drop, along with a 1.6% decline in the crypto market's capitalization to $3.39 trillion, was attributed to pressures from Middle East tensions affecting risky assets. Despite these challenges, analysts maintain optimism about cryptocurrencies.
news.headline: Ethereum ETFs attracted $240M on June 11, outpacing Bitcoin ETFs' $165M, marking a shift in investor preference.

news.summary: In New York on June 12, 2025, K Wave Media, traded on Nasdaq as KWM, revealed its schedule of upcoming movie and TV show launches for the latter part of 2025. Alongside this announcement, the global entertainment firm shared details of its ongoing Bitcoin (BTC) Strategic Reserve Plan, which underscores its distinctive combination of expansion and financial tactics.
news.headline: K Wave Media (Nasdaq: KWM) reveals 2025 content lineup, expands Bitcoin strategic reserve plan.

news.summary: Recon Supply has been designated as the sole distributor in the United States for ReShape's STIMEL-03, Lap-Band® 2.0 FLEX, and entire product line. This exclusive partnership aims to provide these innovative medical devices to American veterans and active-duty service members across the nation. The agreement covers distribution of a wide range of products, with a particular focus on the aforementioned STIMEL-03 and Lap-Band® 2.0 FLEX. The collaboration seeks to ensure that these advanced medical solutions are readily accessible to a significant number of U.S. military personnel.
news.headline: ReShape signs deal with Recon Supply for distribution, including Lap-Band 2.0 FLEX, to VA and DoD markets.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, Hub Cyber Security Ltd., a leading company in confidential computing and advanced secured data fabric technology, based in Tel Aviv, Israel, declared its compliance with all listing requirements of the Nasdaq Capital Market. The company is listed as HUBC on NASDAQ.
news.headline: HUB Cyber Security confirmed full compliance with Nasdaq's listing standards, maintaining compliance with all applicable requirements.

news.summary: Industries such as construction, hospitality, healthcare, and manufacturing are currently on high alert due to concerning economic indicators. Economists are expressing worries about the labor market and overall growth trajectory, reflecting a sense of caution within these sectors.
news.headline: Businesses prepare for Trump's immigration crackdown with sectors like construction, hospitality, health care, and manufacturing concerned. Economists fear impact on labor market and growth.

news.summary: In a recent announcement, Nift revealed its collaboration with Klarna to elevate and customize the customer experience with gift promotions. This partnership aims to enhance the Klarna customer journey by providing unique offerings.
news.headline: Klarna and Nift partner to improve customer experience, boost revenue growth through personalized gift offers. #ecommerce
The Russian Ministry of Defense confirms its readiness to conduct daily exchanges of prisoners of war in accordance with the schedule agreed upon in Istanbul.

news.summary: Utilizing Grok 3 for automated cryptocurrency trading may hold potential benefits; however, challenges such as data loss and incorrect signals could impact one's effectiveness in a rapidly evolving market environment. It is crucial to carefully consider these factors given the high stakes involved in crypto trading.
news.headline: Attempted to automate crypto trades with Grok 3? Watch out for data loss and inaccurate signals that can impact performance.

news.summary: Vine Financial Inc., a commercial lending accelerator based in Austin, Texas, has successfully secured seed funding. This accelerator specializes in providing services to banks and credit unions. Additionally, the company has established its board of directors. The exact amount of seed funding has not been disclosed, but this financial support is crucial for the company's growth and operations. This development marks a significant milestone for Vine Financial Inc. as it positions itself within the commercial lending industry.
news.headline: Vine Financial, a lending accelerator, receives seed funding in Austin, Texas; forms board of directors.

news.summary: CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI) from Reston, Va., recently secured a significant contract for a seven-year task with a total potential value of $437 million. This deal includes a base period along with six additional option periods. The contract involves providing support to U.S. Africa Command (USAFRICOM) in their mission. CACI highlighted their expertise managing Africa's intricate security environment and their adept global team's agility. By harnessing cutting-edge technologies and operational capabilities, CACI aims to elevate the effectiveness of USAFRICOM's mission significantly.
news.headline: CACI awarded $437 million task order for U.S. Africa Command mission support, a 7-year contract.
GERMAN GOVERNMENT OFFICIAL ON G7: DO NOT FORESEE A G7 STATEMENT ON UKRAINE

news.summary: ZenaTech, Inc., a tech company focusing on AI drone, DaaS, enterprise SaaS, and Quantum Computing solutions, plans to file a patent and expedite the rollout of Counter-UAS technology on their ZenaDrone 1000 drone model in light of a recent executive order. This technology aims to identify, monitor, and address unauthorized or risky drones to safeguard individuals, assets, and airspace. The subsidiary ZenaDrone aims to enhance security measures in response to the policy directive.
news.headline: ZenaTech's ZenaDrone to file patent for Counter-UAS tech on ZenaDrone 1000 in response to US Executive Order, focusing on protecting against unauthorized drones.

news.summary: Little Rock, Arkansas, June 12, 2025 - Inuvo, Inc., a prominent provider of artificial intelligence-powered AdTech solutions listed on NYSE American as INUV, confirmed its previous forecast stating an anticipated revenue surge of at least 25% year-over-year for the second quarter. Additionally, the company finalized a 1-for-10 reverse stock split of its common stock after receiving shareholder approval during the Annual Meeting conducted on May 22, 2025.
news.headline: Inuvo reiterates 25% Q2 YOY growth and executes 1:10 reverse stock split in shareholder-approved move.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, in Toronto, NetraMark Holdings Inc. (CSE: AIAI) (OTCQB: AINMF) (Frankfurt: PF0), a company specializing in artificial intelligence solutions for the pharmaceutical industry, revealed that Dr. Joseph Geraci, the founder of NetraMark, led a publication discussing the potential for AI/ML to enhance data quality and patient results in clinical trials. Dr. Geraci's work highlights the significant market potential for AI to streamline access to actionable insights in clinical trial design.
news.headline: NetraMark founder Dr. Joseph Geraci coauthors publication on AI/ML in clinical trials, highlighting potential for improved data quality and patient outcomes. Company: NetraMark Holdings Inc. (CSE: AIAI, OTCQB: AINMF, Frankfurt: PF0).

news.summary: Utilizing the Grok 3 platform for automating cryptocurrency trades may appear advantageous, however challenges such as potential data loss and unreliable signals could negatively impact your results in the rapidly evolving market environment. It is crucial to carefully consider these risks before implementing automated trading strategies to protect your investments.
news.headline: Grok 3 allowed to trade crypto experiences issues like data loss and inaccurate signals, impacting performance in fast markets.

news.summary: The Global Retail E-Commerce Market is projected to grow from USD 7.29 trillion in 2025 to USD 15.62 trillion by 2032, with a CAGR of 11.5%. This growth is driven by the increasing popularity of online shopping, accelerated by the COVID-19 pandemic. The report by Coherent Market Insights indicates that the fashion segment will hold a significant market share in 2025, and online marketplaces will dominate sales channels. Asia Pacific is expected to lead the market, with the Middle East experiencing the fastest growth. Consumers prefer online shopping for its convenience, driving market growth, although concerns about data privacy and logistics challenges could hinder it to some extent.
news.headline: Global Retail E-Commerce Market to reach $15.62 trillion by 2032 with a CAGR of 11.5%. Asia Pacific expected to dominate.

news.summary: In New York, Macy’s will host its renowned Macy's 4th of July Fireworks® show on Friday, July 4, at the Brooklyn Bridge. This spectacular event will illuminate the New York City skyline with vibrant colors and exciting sounds, providing unforgettable experiences for people throughout the nation. The 49th edition of this grand Independence Day celebration will showcase over 80,000 shells bursting in the air. The show will feature 30 vivid colors and impressive effects, including cutting-edge projection mapping on the iconic Brooklyn Bridge, captivating audiences with its visual splendor.
news.headline: Macy's celebrates 4th of July Fireworks with 80,000 shells, 30 colors, on Brooklyn Bridge. Spectacular show for millions.

news.summary: In Cincinnati, Olay and Secret, popular brands under Procter & Gamble, have unveiled the Summer Fizz Scent collection. This limited-edition line includes serum-infused body washes from Olay and clinical strength antiperspirants from Secret. The collection aims to provide a revitalizing burst of freshness, offering fruity fragrances and advanced skin-nourishing technology. It promises a delightful everyday escape with superior skin benefits. Get ready to embrace the summer vibes with this exciting new launch!
news.headline: Olay and Secret launch limited-edition Summer Fizz Scent collection, featuring serum-infused body washes and antiperspirants.

news.summary: Moovila, a prominent AI-powered project automation platform catering to managed service providers (MSPs), was awarded the title of Innovative Vendor of the Year at the 2025 North America Spotlight Awards by the Global Technology Industry Association. The prestigious accolade recognizes Moovila's cutting-edge technology and industry leadership in the field. The event took place in Charleston, South Carolina on June 12, 2025.
news.headline: Moovila wins 2025 GTIA Innovative Vendor Award for impactful industry advancements at North America Spotlight Awards.

news.summary: ROLLER is dedicated to enhancing the world with joyful experiences by equipping attraction venues with user-friendly technology. Based in London, as of June 12, 2025, ROLLER serves as the comprehensive platform for venue management in the leisure industry.
news.headline: ROLLER and Activeon deepen partnership for growth in 72+ locations, enhancing experiences with tech. London, June 12, 2025.
German Government Official on G7: Canadian representatives do not expect wide-ranging G7 statement.

news.summary: A leading figure in women's gymnastics, Valorie Kondos Field guided the UCLA team to an impressive seven NCAA championships. Even after stepping down, she continues to embody her unique and authentic style, making a lasting impact on the sport.
news.headline: Valorie Kondos Field led UCLA gymnastics to 7 NCAA championships and embraces her unique style.

news.summary: Oklo, a nuclear startup, experienced a significant surge in its shares on Wednesday following a government deal. This resulted in a price target increase by analysts. However, on Thursday, the company witnessed a decline in its shares due to a planned share offering. The stock of Oklo is attracting attention as the focus shifts towards the 'AI Revolution', with Donald Trump in the spotlight.
news.headline: Oklo's stock rises after government deal, gets price target hike, but falls after share offering. Trump emphasizes 'AI Revolution'.

news.summary: In 2025, D-Wave stands out as the top performer among quantum computing stocks. The company specializes in annealing quantum technology, positioning itself as a leader in the industry. Recent discussions question whether D-Wave, a pioneer in quantum computing, receives adequate recognition for its advancements.
news.headline: D-Wave leads quantum computing stocks in 2025; pioneering annealing tech. Article questions if firm receives due recognition.

news.summary: CommScope has been selected by Liberty Global to enhance multiple networks for virtualized Distributed Access Architecture. The company made this announcement in Claremont, North Carolina. Liberty Global's decision to opt for CommScope's services, which saw the latter's stock ticker NASDAQ listing as COMM, comes as a significant development.
news.headline: Liberty Global selects CommScope for DOCSIS 4.0 DAA deployment in Europe. Upgrading multiple networks for virtualized DAA.

news.summary: At the ESH 2025 event in Seoul, South Korea, Sky Labs has attracted worldwide interest with their innovative product - the first ring-type cuffless blood pressure monitor. This ground-breaking device is revolutionizing the way blood pressure is monitored globally.
news.headline: Sky Labs in South Korea unveils first cuffless blood pressure monitor at ESH 2025, gaining global attention.

news.summary: Locala has debuted a new tool called Omni Planner in New York, aiming to aid advertisers in merging online and offline engagement data for enhanced performance across digital and in-store platforms. Omni Planner seeks to streamline campaign planning processes, transitioning marketers from analysis to implementation. By amalgamating digital and physical cues, the tool provides comprehensive visibility throughout the entire marketing funnel and enables the creation of customized strategies on a local level. The objective is to empower advertisers to plan with greater effectiveness and achieve more robust outcomes in all markets.
news.headline: Locala launches Omni Planner to merge online and offline data for enhanced media strategies, ensuring full-funnel visibility and improved ad performance.

news.summary: In Wayne, Pennsylvania, PurpleLab®, a prominent US real-world healthcare claims data provider, has collaborated with Comscore, a worldwide consumer behavior measurement expert. They have announced a key partnership to offer PurpleLab's detailed healthcare targeting segments as ID-free Predictive Audiences on The Trade Desk's Contextual Marketplace. This move comes in response to alterations in state privacy laws affecting pharmaceutical advertising. This strategic alliance aims to provide precise targeting solutions to address these regulatory changes in the industry.
news.headline: PurpleLab and Comscore team up to offer healthcare predictive audiences on The Trade Desk. Helps pharma industry amid privacy changes.
